title: neotinea intacta var. tridentata
intro: Neotinea intacta var. tridentata is a rare, endemic orchid species found in the Azores, Portugal. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to treat various conditions such as digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Neotinea intacta var. tridentata is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
